home.hero_description: Manage souls across Chinese Diyu, European Heaven & Hell, and Egyptian Duat — from a single unified platform.
home.chinese_desc: Ten Courts of Yama, Mengpo Soup, Six Realms of Reincarnation
home.european_desc: Christian Tribunal, Purgatory, Dante's Circles, Lethe River
home.egyptian_desc: Osiris Judgment, Heart Weighing against Ma'at Feather, Field of Reeds
